wind_adjustment.note: Forecast wind at peak (S at 15 mph) is in the offshore sector — water at 342 Bay is typically ~1.6" lower than the main prediction because bay-corner water is being pushed away from Highlands. Expect actual closer to this wind-adjusted estimate.
